creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software/>

> Consulting Services | The FreeBSD Project

The HTML title of the page seems wrong. 


<https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software/#Sophos>

> … Sophos Anti-Virus for FreeBSD. …

I suspect that this no longer exists (I sought an AV solution, years ago). 


<https://www.freebsd.org/commercial/software/#Aestiva>

> … Visit www.htmlos.com …

<http://www.htmlos.com/> is 403 forbidden. 


And so on …
